prompt: sunlit vineyard rows at golden hour, cinematic, text-free

_notes.durable_record: This internal ledger is the durable provenance record because C2PA is routinely stripped by platforms/recompression. Retain C2PA where present; do NOT add a c2patool re-embed binary.
_notes.flux_dev_trap: If model/license contains 'flux-dev' or 'non-commercial' AND for_client is true, provenance.py audit FAILS loudly — the non-commercial trap.
_notes.license_neq_ownership: license=commercial permits use/sale; it does NOT confer enforceable US copyright over the AI portions (Thaler).
_notes.price: Any associated price is [unverified — confirm on provider pricing page]; prices are not stored in this ledger.
_notes.format: The live ledger is JSON Lines (one entry object per line); this file is a single pretty-printed example. Append with scripts/provenance.py record.
